productDisplayName: Hanes Men Blue V DuoDry Body Fit V-Neck T-shirt
description: Composition Blue V-neck T-shirt made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, has a lay flat collar and half sleeves with ribbed wide hems with a brand badge on the left sleeve Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron Lightweight with a V-neck, this hanes T-shirt is created using a superior cotton-elastane fabric that lets the fabric contour to your body fit and allows you to stretch in ease. And it's not just stretching, but keeping you dry as well, for this tee is engineered with Duo-Dry Moisture Management Technology. And what's even better is that it comes with a printed brand label on the inner neck - so bid goodbye to those scratchy labels and welcome comfort at its best! Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
